queries.question: What unit descriptions do we have for every apartment building?
queries.sql: SELECT Units.description  from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id   GROUP BY Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Apartment_Buildings)

queries.question: What unit descriptions do we have for every apartment building?
queries.sql: select apartment_buildings.name , units.description from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?apartment_buildings_units a :Apartment_Buildings_Units .
  ?units a :Units .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasUnits ?units .
  ?apartment_buildings a :Apartment_Buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasApartment_Buildings ?apartment_buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings p:name ?name .
  ?units p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Which type of unit is common to all apartment buildings?
queries.sql: SELECT Units.unit_type  from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id   GROUP BY Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Apartment_Buildings)

queries.question: For each apartment building, list the unit type and descriptions they have.
queries.sql: select apartment_buildings.name , units.unit_type , units.description from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?unit_type ?description WHERE {
  ?apartment_buildings_units a :Apartment_Buildings_Units .
  ?units a :Units .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasUnits ?units .
  ?apartment_buildings a :Apartment_Buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasApartment_Buildings ?apartment_buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings p:name ?name .
  ?units p:unit_type ?unit_type .
  ?units p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the types and descriptions of units that are in each apartment building.
queries.sql: SELECT Units.unit_type, Units.description  from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id   GROUP BY Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Apartment_Buildings)

queries.question: Give me the type of unit for each apartment building.
queries.sql: select apartment_buildings.name , units.unit_type from Apartment_Buildings_Units join Units on Apartment_Buildings_Units.unit_id = Units.id join Apartment_Buildings on Apartment_Buildings_Units.building_id = Apartment_Buildings.id
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?unit_type WHERE {
  ?apartment_buildings_units a :Apartment_Buildings_Units .
  ?units a :Units .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasUnits ?units .
  ?apartment_buildings a :Apartment_Buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings_units p:hasApartment_Buildings ?apartment_buildings .
  ?apartment_buildings p:name ?name .
  ?units p:unit_type ?unit_type .
}
